Maybe not as much as others. Also, not as immediately recognizable as Louis. D) Gwen: Gwen is a female name. I don't think there's a famous jazz musician named Gwen. Maybe a contemporary artist, but I can't think of any major ones by that name. E) James: James... There are several jazz musicians named James, like James Brown (though he's more of a soul/funk artist) or maybe James Moody. But again, not as directly associated with being a "first name" example.
